orchestrator_notes: RT-5. 360 Memory entry title shows 'Unknown' instead of project title in UI. Entry #27 displayed as 'Unknown'. Also 'Type: Sequence: #27' display is confusing. Trace the full flow: write_360_memory -> product_memory_entries table -> API response -> Vue UI rendering. P2 severity, E1 effort.

sessions.title: Research: 360 Memory 'Unknown' Title Bug
planned_tasks: Read write_360_memory.py — what fields are stored when a memory entry is created?
Read ProductMemoryEntry model — what columns exist? Is there a title/name field?
Read product_memory_repository.py — how are entries stored and retrieved?
Trace the API endpoint that returns memory entries for the UI (likely GET /api/products/{id}/memory or similar)
Check: does the entry store project_name? Or does it need to JOIN to projects table?
Check: is 'Unknown' a default value in the model, the API, or the Vue frontend?
Read the Vue component that displays memory entries (search for 'Unknown' or '360 Memory' in frontend code)
Check the 'Type: Sequence: #27' display — where does this format come from?
Determine: is this a backend missing-field bug, an API response gap, or a frontend display issue?
tasks_completed: Read write_360_memory.py — what fields are stored when a memory entry is created?
Read ProductMemoryEntry model — what columns exist? Is there a title/name field?
Read product_memory_repository.py — how are entries stored and retrieved?
Trace the API endpoint that returns memory entries for the UI (GET /api/v1/products/{id}/memory-entries)
Check: does the entry store project_name? Or does it need to JOIN to projects table?
Check: is 'Unknown' a default value in the model, the API, or the Vue frontend?
Read the Vue component that displays memory entries (CloseoutModal.vue)
Check the 'Type: Sequence: #27' display — where does this format come from?
Determine: is this a backend missing-field bug, an API response gap, or a frontend display issue?
deviations: API endpoint was at api/endpoints/products/memory.py, not src/giljo_mcp/api/
ManualCloseoutModal.vue also exists but does not display memory entries (only writes)

findings.root_cause: FRONTEND field name mismatch. The API returns 'entry_type' but CloseoutModal.vue reads 'entry.type' (undefined). formatEntryType(undefined) returns 'Unknown'. Secondary: panel title shows entry type instead of project_name.

root_cause_details.primary: Field name mismatch between API response and frontend template. The MemoryEntryResponse Pydantic model uses field name 'entry_type' (serialized as JSON key 'entry_type'). But CloseoutModal.vue references 'entry.type' which is undefined in the API response. The formatEntryType() function returns 'Unknown' when input is falsy.
root_cause_details.secondary: Panel title design shows entry type instead of project name. The template uses 'Entry #{{ entry.sequence }} - {{ formatEntryType(entry.type) }}' but never displays entry.project_name, which IS available in the API response.
root_cause_details.tertiary: The metadata section at lines 163-170 shows raw 'Type: {{ entry.type }}' (undefined/empty) followed by 'Sequence: #{{ entry.sequence }}'. When entry.type is undefined, this renders as 'Type:  Sequence: #27' which looks like a single confusing label.
root_cause_details.note_on_to_dict_vs_api: The model's to_dict() returns key 'type' (matching frontend expectation), but the API endpoint transforms this to 'entry_type' via the MemoryEntryResponse Pydantic model. This transformation is the source of the mismatch.

write_path.project_name_source: project.name (line 418 of write_360_memory.py, line 186 of project_closeout.py)
write_path.verdict: Write path is CORRECT. project_name is properly stored at write time.

read_path.flow: GET /api/v1/products/{product_id}/memory-entries -> ProductMemoryEntry query -> entry.to_dict() -> MemoryEntryResponse Pydantic model -> JSON response
read_path.field_name_transformation: to_dict() key 'type' -> mapped to MemoryEntryResponse field 'entry_type' at memory.py line 116
read_path.verdict: Read path correctly includes project_name. The key transformation from 'type' to 'entry_type' causes the frontend mismatch.

frontend_display.project_name_used: NOT used anywhere in entry panel (only in modal header via projectName prop)
frontend_display.unknown_source: formatEntryType(entry.type) where entry.type is undefined because API returns entry_type
frontend_display.confusing_display_source: Lines 163-170: Two divs showing 'Type: [empty]' and 'Sequence: #27' separately, rendered as 'Type:  Sequence: #27'

proposed_fix.approach: Fix field name mismatch + improve entry title to show project name

changes.reason: Show project_name as primary label, fix field name to entry_type
Fix field name and use human-readable format
Consolidate metadata into single readable line with pipe separators

proposed_fix.alternative_approach: Could instead add alias='type' to MemoryEntryResponse.entry_type field via Field(..., alias='type', serialization_alias='type') so the JSON key matches to_dict() output. But this only fixes the field name, not the missing project_name in title.
proposed_fix.estimated_effort: E1 (15-30 minutes) - 3 line changes in 1 file
proposed_fix.risk: Low - purely frontend display change, no backend or data changes needed

sessions.notes_for_next: Fix is purely frontend. Change 'entry.type' to 'entry.entry_type' in CloseoutModal.vue (3 occurrences). Optionally improve panel title to show entry.project_name. No backend changes needed. The write path and API are both correct - project_name is stored and returned properly.
sessions.summary: Traced full data flow. Root cause is a field name mismatch: API returns 'entry_type' but CloseoutModal.vue reads 'entry.type' (undefined -> 'Unknown'). project_name IS stored in DB and returned by API but is not used in the entry panel title. The confusing 'Type: Sequence: #27' display comes from undefined entry.type rendering as empty text adjacent to the Sequence label.

sessions.title: Implement: 360 Memory Title Fix

Update panel title to include entry.project_name
Improve metadata section formatting (consolidate Type + Sequence)

In CloseoutModal.vue line 165: change entry.type to entry.entry_type
Update panel title to include entry.project_name

Verified no remaining entry.type references in file
sessions.summary: Fixed 3 issues in CloseoutModal.vue: (1) Panel title now shows project_name with fallback to 'Entry #N', uses entry.entry_type instead of entry.type. (2) Metadata section uses formatEntryType(entry.entry_type) instead of raw entry.type. (3) Metadata consolidated into single line with pipe separators: Type | Sequence | Source.

chain_summary: Fixed 360 Memory 'Unknown' title bug (RT-5). Root cause: CloseoutModal.vue used entry.type but API returns entry_type. Fixed field name mismatch, added project_name to panel title, consolidated metadata display.
